# Aurora Studio

> AI performance shots, music-video stills, lip-sync clips and UGC ads — generated from a single selfie using the world's top image and video models in one canvas.

Aurora bundles Seedance 2.0, Kling 3.0, Nano Banana Pro, Seedream 4.5 and Sync 1.9 lip-sync into a unified credit-based studio. Creators upload a reference, pick a scene, color and workflow, and get cinematic results in seconds.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Product overview, showcase, pricing, FAQ.
- [Canvas](/canvas): Node-based orchestration playground with trending workflows and the Aurora agent.
- [Colors Studio](/colors): Pick a color and scene (studio, indoor, rooftop, street) and shoot a portrait.
- [UGC Studio](/ugc): Scroll-stopping UGC ads from one selfie.
- [Workflows](/workflows): Save, share and re-run generation graphs.
- [Gallery](/gallery): Public gallery of community generations.
- [Gifts](/gifts): Gift Aurora credits to another creator.
- [Affiliate](/affiliate): Earn 20% recurring on referred credit purchases.
- [Contact](/contact): Reach the Aurora team.

## Optional

- [Terms](/legal/terms): Terms of service.
- [Privacy](/legal/privacy): Privacy policy.
